mapper.select: SELECT ph.track_id AS trackId, t.title AS title, ar.name AS artistName, al.title AS albumTitle, t.cover_url AS coverUrl, ph.played_seconds AS playedSeconds, ph.played_at AS playedAt FROM play_history ph JOIN ( SELECT track_id, MAX(played_at) AS max_at FROM play_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY track_id ) latest ON latest.track_id = ph.track_id AND latest.max_at = ph.played_at JOIN track t ON t.id = ph.track_id LEFT JOIN artist ar ON ar.id = t.artist_id LEFT JOIN album al ON al.id = t.album_id WHERE ph.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ph.played_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
